system.effect: Creates a spectacle of lights visible for half a mile that fascinates anyone who sees it. Affected characters cannot move and may only perform Passive Actions. MR or PsR Check Difficulty 120 to resist. They may repeat the check each time they are attacked. Condition for being affected is looking directly at the display.
system.addedEffect: +1 mile to radius and +5 to MR or PsR Difficulty.
